---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the skill or an example doesn't work
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the problem.

**Where**
- [ ] Skill (`bifrost-gateway` / `bifrost-gateway-ru`)
- [ ] Example (which one: `examples/...`)
- [ ] Docs / README

**To reproduce**
Steps, and the model string / endpoint you used (e.g. `openai/gpt-4o-mini`,
`/v1/responses`).

**Environment**
Language/SDK + version (e.g. openai-php/client 0.13, Laravel AI SDK, Python openai 1.66).

> Do NOT paste your real gateway host or `sk-bf-` key.
